---
title: "GSE150318_tPLSDA_analysis"
author: "Zilong Wang"
date: "2026-05-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(GEOquery)
library(mixOmics)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(tensorOmics)

load_author_utility_or_define_fallback <- function() {
  if (file.exists("helper/utility.R")) {
    source("helper/utility.R")
  }

  if (!exists("loadingPlot", mode = "function")) {
    loadingPlot <<- function(
      loadings,
      merged_df,
      comp = 1,
      top = 10,
      negGroup = NULL,
      posGroup = NULL,
      group_col = "rGroup",
      time_col = "rDay",
      id_col = "Participant",
      feature_start_col = 7,
      use_letters = TRUE,
      group_colors = NULL
    ) {
      feature_cols <- names(merged_df)[feature_start_col:ncol(merged_df)]
      feature_cols <- intersect(rownames(loadings), feature_cols)

      if (length(feature_cols) == 0) {
        stop("No feature columns in merged_df match rownames(loadings).")
      }

      loading_values <- loadings[feature_cols, comp]
      top_features <- names(sort(abs(loading_values), decreasing = TRUE))[
        seq_len(min(top, length(feature_cols)))
      ]

      plot_df <- merged_df %>%
        select(all_of(c(group_col, time_col, id_col, top_features))) %>%
        pivot_longer(
          cols = all_of(top_features),
          names_to = "Feature",
          values_to = "Expression"
        )

      summary_df <- plot_df %>%
        group_by(across(all_of(c("Feature", group_col, time_col)))) %>%
        summarise(
          MeanExpression = mean(Expression, na.rm = TRUE),
          SE = sd(Expression, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()),
          .groups = "drop"
        )

      p <- ggplot(
        summary_df,
        aes_string(
          x = time_col,
          y = "MeanExpression",
          color = group_col,
          group = group_col
        )
      ) +
        geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
        geom_point(size = 2) +
        geom_errorbar(
          aes(ymin = MeanExpression - SE, ymax = MeanExpression + SE),
          width = 0.15,
          linewidth = 0.4
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ Feature, scales = "free_y") +
        theme_bw() +
        labs(
          title = paste0("Top loading feature trajectories, component ", comp),
          x = time_col,
          y = "Mean expression",
          color = group_col
        )

      if (!is.null(group_colors)) {
        p <- p + scale_color_manual(values = group_colors)
      }

      print(p)
      invisible(p)
    }
  }
}

load_author_utility_or_define_fallback()
```

1.  Download and load data

```{r}
data_dir <- file.path("data", "GSE150318")
dir.create(data_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

counts_url <- "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/download/?acc=GSE150318&file=GSE150318_counts.csv.gz&format=file"
counts_path <- file.path(data_dir, "GSE150318_counts.csv.gz")

if (!file.exists(counts_path)) {
  download.file(
    counts_url,
    destfile = counts_path,
    mode = "wb"
  )
}

gse <- getGEO("GSE150318", GSEMatrix = TRUE)
meta <- pData(gse[[1]])

counts <- read.csv(
  gzfile(counts_path),
  row.names = 1,
  check.names = FALSE
)

dim(counts)
dim(meta)
colnames(counts)[1:10]
```

2.  Parse sample names

```{r}
sample_info <- data.frame(
  SampleName = colnames(counts)
)

sample_info <- sample_info %>%
  mutate(
    FishID = sub("_(10|20)w$", "", SampleName),
    Time = sub("^.*_(10|20)w$", "\\1", SampleName),
    TimeWeek = as.numeric(sub("w", "", Time))
  )

head(sample_info, 12)
table(sample_info$TimeWeek)
length(unique(sample_info$FishID))

paired_check <- sample_info %>%
  count(FishID) %>%
  count(n, name = "number_of_fish")

paired_check
```

3.  Parse metadata

```{r}
meta_parsed <- data.frame(
  SampleName = colnames(counts),
  GeoID = rownames(meta),
  Title = meta$title,
  FishID_meta = sub("animal id: ", "", meta$characteristics_ch1.1),
  TimeWeek_meta = as.numeric(sub("age at fin clip \\(weeks\\): ", "", meta$characteristics_ch1.4)),
  AgeDeathDays = as.numeric(sub("age at death \\(days\\): ", "", meta$characteristics_ch1.5))
)

meta_parsed <- meta_parsed %>%
  mutate(
    FishID_from_counts = sub("_(10|20)w$", "", SampleName),
    TimeWeek_from_counts = as.numeric(sub("^.*_(10|20)w$", "\\1", SampleName))
  )

table(meta_parsed$FishID_meta == meta_parsed$FishID_from_counts)
table(meta_parsed$TimeWeek_meta == meta_parsed$TimeWeek_from_counts)

fish_info <- meta_parsed %>%
  distinct(FishID_meta, AgeDeathDays) %>%
  arrange(FishID_meta)

median_death <- median(fish_info$AgeDeathDays, na.rm = TRUE)

fish_info <- fish_info %>%
  mutate(
    LifespanGroup = ifelse(AgeDeathDays <= median_death, "short_lived", "long_lived"),
    LifespanGroup = factor(LifespanGroup, levels = c("short_lived", "long_lived"))
  )

median_death
table(fish_info$LifespanGroup)
head(fish_info, 20)
```

4.  Normalize and filter genes

```{r}
valid_fish <- fish_info %>%
  filter(!is.na(AgeDeathDays))

valid_samples <- meta_parsed %>%
  filter(FishID_meta %in% valid_fish$FishID_meta) %>%
  arrange(FishID_meta, TimeWeek_meta)

counts_valid <- counts[, valid_samples$SampleName]

dim(counts_valid)
length(unique(valid_samples$FishID_meta))
table(valid_samples$TimeWeek_meta)

valid_samples %>%
  count(FishID_meta) %>%
  count(n, name = "number_of_fish")

keep_genes <- rowSums(counts_valid) > 10
counts_filtered <- counts_valid[keep_genes, ]

cpm <- t(t(counts_filtered) / colSums(counts_filtered)) * 1e6
logcpm <- log2(cpm + 1)

gene_var <- apply(logcpm, 1, var)
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:1000]

logcpm_top <- logcpm[top_genes, ]

nrow(counts)
nrow(counts_filtered)
dim(logcpm_top)
head(top_genes, 10)
```

5.  Create tensor: fish Ã— genes Ã— time

```{r}
fish_order <- valid_fish$FishID_meta
gene_order <- rownames(logcpm_top)
time_order <- c(10, 20)

X_tensor <- array(
  NA,
  dim = c(length(fish_order), length(gene_order), length(time_order)),
  dimnames = list(
    fish_order,
    gene_order,
    paste0(time_order, "w")
  )
)

for (i in seq_along(fish_order)) {
  for (k in seq_along(time_order)) {
    
    fish_id <- fish_order[i]
    time_week <- time_order[k]
    
    sample_name <- valid_samples %>%
      filter(FishID_meta == fish_id, TimeWeek_meta == time_week) %>%
      pull(SampleName)
    
    X_tensor[i, , k] <- logcpm_top[, sample_name]
  }
}

group_vec <- valid_fish$LifespanGroup
names(group_vec) <- valid_fish$FishID_meta

dim(X_tensor)
length(group_vec)
table(group_vec)
sum(is.na(X_tensor))

X_tensor[1, 1:5, ]
```

6.  Matrix-based PCA and PLS-DA

```{r}
sample_meta <- valid_samples %>%
  left_join(valid_fish, by = "FishID_meta")

X_matrix <- t(logcpm_top[, sample_meta$SampleName])
rownames(X_matrix) <- sample_meta$SampleName

sample_group <- sample_meta$LifespanGroup
sample_time <- sample_meta$TimeWeek_meta

pca_res <- mixOmics::pca(X_matrix, ncomp = 2)

res_pca <- data.frame(
  Group = sample_group,
  Time = sample_time,
  PC1 = pca_res$variates$X[, 1],
  PC2 = pca_res$variates$X[, 2]
)

ggplot(res_pca, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Group, alpha = Time)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("PCA: matrix-based unsupervised") +
  xlab("Component 1") +
  ylab("Component 2")

plsda_res <- mixOmics::plsda(X_matrix, sample_group, ncomp = 2)

res_plsda <- data.frame(
  Group = sample_group,
  Time = sample_time,
  PC1 = plsda_res$variates$X[, 1],
  PC2 = plsda_res$variates$X[, 2]
)

ggplot(res_plsda, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Group, alpha = Time)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("PLS-DA: matrix-based supervised") +
  xlab("Component 1") +
  ylab("Component 2")

dim(X_matrix)
table(sample_group)
table(sample_time)
```

7.  Tensor-based tPLS-DA

```{r}
tplsda_res <- tplsda(X_tensor, group_vec, ncomp = 2)

res_tplsda <- data.frame(
  FishID = names(group_vec),
  Group = group_vec,
  AgeDeathDays = valid_fish$AgeDeathDays,
  PC1 = tplsda_res$x_projected[, 1],
  PC2 = tplsda_res$x_projected[, 2]
)

ggplot(res_tplsda, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("tPLS-DA: tensor-based supervised") +
  xlab("Component 1") +
  ylab("Component 2")

dim(tplsda_res$x_projected)
head(res_tplsda)
table(res_tplsda$Group)
```

8.  Inspect loadings

```{r}
names(tplsda_res)
dim(tplsda_res$x_loadings)
head(tplsda_res$x_loadings)
```

```{r}
gc()

load_author_utility_or_define_fallback()

gene_names <- rownames(tplsda_res$x_loadings)

if (is.null(gene_names) || length(gene_names) != nrow(tplsda_res$x_loadings)) {
  gene_names <- gene_order
}

loading_comp1 <- data.frame(
  Gene = gene_names,
  Loading = tplsda_res$x_loadings[, 1]
)

top10_genes_author <- loading_comp1 %>%
  mutate(AbsLoading = abs(Loading)) %>%
  arrange(desc(AbsLoading)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  pull(Gene)

cat("Top 10 genes for Component 1:\n")
print(top10_genes_author)

loadings_small <- tplsda_res$x_loadings[
  match(top10_genes_author, gene_names),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

rownames(loadings_small) <- top10_genes_author

sample_meta_for_plot <- valid_samples %>%
  select(SampleName, FishID_meta, TimeWeek_meta) %>%
  left_join(
    valid_fish %>% select(FishID_meta, AgeDeathDays, LifespanGroup),
    by = "FishID_meta"
  ) %>%
  arrange(FishID_meta, TimeWeek_meta)

feature_table_gene_small <- t(logcpm_top[top10_genes_author, sample_meta_for_plot$SampleName])
feature_table_gene_small <- as.data.frame(feature_table_gene_small)
rownames(feature_table_gene_small) <- sample_meta_for_plot$SampleName

cat("Rows in sample metadata:\n")
print(nrow(sample_meta_for_plot))

cat("Rows in feature table:\n")
print(nrow(feature_table_gene_small))

cat("Columns in feature table:\n")
print(ncol(feature_table_gene_small))

merged_df_gene_small <- data.frame(
  rGroup = sample_meta_for_plot$LifespanGroup,
  Participant = sample_meta_for_plot$FishID_meta,
  rDay = sample_meta_for_plot$TimeWeek_meta,
  SampleName = sample_meta_for_plot$SampleName,
  AgeDeathDays = sample_meta_for_plot$AgeDeathDays,
  Sex = rep("male", nrow(sample_meta_for_plot)),
  feature_table_gene_small,
  check.names = FALSE
)

merged_df_gene_small$rGroup <- factor(
  merged_df_gene_small$rGroup,
  levels = c("short_lived", "long_lived")
)

custom_colors_lifespan <- c(
  "short_lived" = "tomato",
  "long_lived" = "turquoise3"
)

loadingPlot(
  loadings = loadings_small,
  merged_df = merged_df_gene_small,
  comp = 1,
  top = 10,
  negGroup = c("long_lived"),
  posGroup = c("short_lived"),
  group_col = "rGroup",
  time_col = "rDay",
  id_col = "Participant",
  feature_start_col = 7,
  use_letters = TRUE,
  group_colors = custom_colors_lifespan
)
```

```{r}
gc()

load_author_utility_or_define_fallback()

gene_names <- rownames(tplsda_res$x_loadings)

if (is.null(gene_names) || length(gene_names) != nrow(tplsda_res$x_loadings)) {
  gene_names <- gene_order
}

loading_comp2 <- data.frame(
  Gene = gene_names,
  Loading = tplsda_res$x_loadings[, 2]
)

top10_genes_comp2 <- loading_comp2 %>%
  mutate(AbsLoading = abs(Loading)) %>%
  arrange(desc(AbsLoading)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  pull(Gene)

cat("Top 10 genes for Component 2:\n")
print(top10_genes_comp2)

loadings_small_comp2 <- tplsda_res$x_loadings[
  match(top10_genes_comp2, gene_names),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

rownames(loadings_small_comp2) <- top10_genes_comp2

sample_meta_for_plot <- valid_samples %>%
  select(SampleName, FishID_meta, TimeWeek_meta) %>%
  left_join(
    valid_fish %>% select(FishID_meta, AgeDeathDays, LifespanGroup),
    by = "FishID_meta"
  ) %>%
  arrange(FishID_meta, TimeWeek_meta)

feature_table_gene_small_comp2 <- t(logcpm_top[top10_genes_comp2, sample_meta_for_plot$SampleName])
feature_table_gene_small_comp2 <- as.data.frame(feature_table_gene_small_comp2)
rownames(feature_table_gene_small_comp2) <- sample_meta_for_plot$SampleName

merged_df_gene_small_comp2 <- data.frame(
  rGroup = sample_meta_for_plot$LifespanGroup,
  Participant = sample_meta_for_plot$FishID_meta,
  rDay = sample_meta_for_plot$TimeWeek_meta,
  SampleName = sample_meta_for_plot$SampleName,
  AgeDeathDays = sample_meta_for_plot$AgeDeathDays,
  Sex = rep("male", nrow(sample_meta_for_plot)),
  feature_table_gene_small_comp2,
  check.names = FALSE
)

merged_df_gene_small_comp2$rGroup <- factor(
  merged_df_gene_small_comp2$rGroup,
  levels = c("short_lived", "long_lived")
)

custom_colors_lifespan <- c(
  "short_lived" = "tomato",
  "long_lived" = "turquoise3"
)

loadingPlot(
  loadings = loadings_small_comp2,
  merged_df = merged_df_gene_small_comp2,
  comp = 2,
  top = 10,
  negGroup = c("short_lived"),
  posGroup = c("long_lived"),
  group_col = "rGroup",
  time_col = "rDay",
  id_col = "Participant",
  feature_start_col = 7,
  use_letters = TRUE,
  group_colors = custom_colors_lifespan
)
```


9. Stronger validation and trajectory-level follow-up

```{r}
###############################################################################
# Stronger follow-up analysis for the fish aging experiment
#
# This chunk is designed to be pasted after the current tPLS-DA/loading sections.
# It assumes that the following objects already exist from the previous analysis:
# X_tensor, group_vec, valid_fish, valid_samples, logcpm_top, gene_order,
# time_order, tplsda_res
###############################################################################

out_dir_fish <- file.path("results", "GSE150318", "generated")
dir.create(out_dir_fish, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

set.seed(123)

###############################################################################
# 1) Subject-level statistical test on tPLS-DA scores
###############################################################################

gene_names <- rownames(tplsda_res$x_loadings)
if (is.null(gene_names) || length(gene_names) != nrow(tplsda_res$x_loadings)) {
  gene_names <- gene_order
  rownames(tplsda_res$x_loadings) <- gene_order
}

tplsda_scores <- data.frame(
  FishID = names(group_vec),
  Group = factor(group_vec, levels = c("short_lived", "long_lived")),
  AgeDeathDays = valid_fish$AgeDeathDays[match(names(group_vec), valid_fish$FishID_meta)],
  Comp1 = tplsda_res$x_projected[, 1],
  Comp2 = tplsda_res$x_projected[, 2]
)

get_pillai <- function(score_df) {
  fit <- manova(cbind(Comp1, Comp2) ~ Group, data = score_df)
  st <- summary(fit, test = "Pillai")$stats
  data.frame(
    statistic = unname(st[1, "Pillai"]),
    p_value = unname(st[1, "Pr(>F)"])
  )
}

obs_tplsda_manova <- get_pillai(tplsda_scores)
obs_tplsda_manova$analysis <- "tPLS-DA scores Comp1-Comp2 ~ lifespan group"

###############################################################################
# 2) Permutation test: is the supervised separation stronger than random labels?
###############################################################################

calc_tplsda_pillai <- function(y_perm) {
  y_perm <- factor(y_perm, levels = c("short_lived", "long_lived"))
  mod_perm <- tensorOmics::tplsda(X_tensor, y_perm, ncomp = 2)
  score_perm <- data.frame(
    Group = y_perm,
    Comp1 = mod_perm$x_projected[, 1],
    Comp2 = mod_perm$x_projected[, 2]
  )
  get_pillai(score_perm)$statistic
}

n_perm <- 200
perm_tplsda_stats <- replicate(
  n_perm,
  calc_tplsda_pillai(sample(as.character(group_vec)))
)

tplsda_perm_test <- data.frame(
  analysis = "tPLS-DA label permutation",
  statistic = obs_tplsda_manova$statistic,
  p_value = (1 + sum(perm_tplsda_stats >= obs_tplsda_manova$statistic)) / (n_perm + 1),
  n_perm = n_perm
)

###############################################################################
# 3) Continuous lifespan interpretation
#    This tests whether the tensor components are associated with actual lifespan.
###############################################################################

lifespan_lm <- lm(AgeDeathDays ~ Comp1 + Comp2, data = tplsda_scores)
lifespan_lm_summary <- summary(lifespan_lm)

lifespan_lm_table <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(coef(lifespan_lm_summary)),
  estimate = coef(lifespan_lm_summary)[, "Estimate"],
  std_error = coef(lifespan_lm_summary)[, "Std. Error"],
  statistic = coef(lifespan_lm_summary)[, "t value"],
  p_value = coef(lifespan_lm_summary)[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
  row.names = NULL
)

lifespan_model_summary <- data.frame(
  model = "AgeDeathDays ~ tPLSDA Comp1 + Comp2",
  r_squared = lifespan_lm_summary$r.squared,
  adj_r_squared = lifespan_lm_summary$adj.r.squared,
  f_statistic = unname(lifespan_lm_summary$fstatistic[1]),
  p_value = pf(
    lifespan_lm_summary$fstatistic[1],
    lifespan_lm_summary$fstatistic[2],
    lifespan_lm_summary$fstatistic[3],
    lower.tail = FALSE
  )
)

cor_comp1_lifespan <- cor.test(tplsda_scores$Comp1, tplsda_scores$AgeDeathDays)
cor_comp2_lifespan <- cor.test(tplsda_scores$Comp2, tplsda_scores$AgeDeathDays)

lifespan_cor_table <- data.frame(
  component = c("Comp1", "Comp2"),
  correlation = c(unname(cor_comp1_lifespan$estimate), unname(cor_comp2_lifespan$estimate)),
  p_value = c(cor_comp1_lifespan$p.value, cor_comp2_lifespan$p.value)
)

###############################################################################
# 4) Matrix comparison using a subject-level concatenated matrix
#    Each fish is represented by [10w genes | 20w genes].
###############################################################################

X_concat <- do.call(
  cbind,
  lapply(seq_along(time_order), function(k) X_tensor[, , k])
)
colnames(X_concat) <- paste0(
  rep(gene_order, times = length(time_order)),
  "_",
  rep(dimnames(X_tensor)[[3]], each = length(gene_order))
)
rownames(X_concat) <- names(group_vec)

concat_plsda_res <- mixOmics::plsda(X_concat, group_vec, ncomp = 2)

concat_scores <- data.frame(
  FishID = names(group_vec),
  Group = factor(group_vec, levels = c("short_lived", "long_lived")),
  Comp1 = concat_plsda_res$variates$X[, 1],
  Comp2 = concat_plsda_res$variates$X[, 2]
)

concat_manova <- get_pillai(concat_scores)
concat_manova$analysis <- "Concatenated matrix PLS-DA scores Comp1-Comp2 ~ lifespan group"

###############################################################################
# 5) Trajectory-specific gene analysis
#    For each gene, compare the 20w-10w change between lifespan groups.
###############################################################################

delta_mat <- X_tensor[, , "20w"] - X_tensor[, , "10w"]
delta_group <- factor(group_vec[rownames(delta_mat)], levels = c("short_lived", "long_lived"))

delta_tests <- lapply(seq_len(ncol(delta_mat)), function(j) {
  gene <- colnames(delta_mat)[j]
  delta <- delta_mat[, j]
  tt <- t.test(delta ~ delta_group)
  data.frame(
    Gene = gene,
    mean_delta_short = mean(delta[delta_group == "short_lived"], na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_delta_long = mean(delta[delta_group == "long_lived"], na.rm = TRUE),
    difference_long_minus_short =
      mean(delta[delta_group == "long_lived"], na.rm = TRUE) -
      mean(delta[delta_group == "short_lived"], na.rm = TRUE),
    p_value = tt$p.value
  )
})

delta_tests <- bind_rows(delta_tests) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_value)

loading_table <- data.frame(
  Gene = gene_names,
  LoadingComp1 = tplsda_res$x_loadings[, 1],
  LoadingComp2 = tplsda_res$x_loadings[, 2]
) %>%
  mutate(
    AbsLoadingComp1 = abs(LoadingComp1),
    AbsLoadingComp2 = abs(LoadingComp2),
    AbsLoadingMax = pmax(AbsLoadingComp1, AbsLoadingComp2)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(AbsLoadingMax))

top_loading_with_delta <- loading_table %>%
  left_join(delta_tests, by = "Gene") %>%
  arrange(desc(AbsLoadingMax))

###############################################################################
# 6) Overlap between tPLS-DA loadings and genes with differential trajectories
###############################################################################

n_top <- 50
top_loading_genes <- loading_table %>%
  slice(1:n_top) %>%
  pull(Gene)

top_delta_genes <- delta_tests %>%
  slice(1:n_top) %>%
  pull(Gene)

overlap_genes <- intersect(top_loading_genes, top_delta_genes)
n_genes_tested <- length(gene_order)

overlap_summary <- data.frame(
  top_n = n_top,
  n_genes_tested = n_genes_tested,
  overlap = length(overlap_genes),
  expected_overlap = n_top * n_top / n_genes_tested,
  hypergeom_p_value = phyper(
    length(overlap_genes) - 1,
    n_top,
    n_genes_tested - n_top,
    n_top,
    lower.tail = FALSE
  ),
  overlap_genes = paste(overlap_genes, collapse = ";")
)

###############################################################################
# 7) Plot tPLS-DA scores with actual lifespan as continuous color
###############################################################################

p_tplsda_lifespan <- ggplot(
  tplsda_scores,
  aes(x = Comp1, y = Comp2, color = AgeDeathDays, shape = Group)
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle("tPLS-DA scores colored by actual lifespan") +
  xlab("Component 1") +
  ylab("Component 2")

print(p_tplsda_lifespan)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_tplsda_scores_lifespan_gradient.png"),
  plot = p_tplsda_lifespan,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

###############################################################################
# 8) Plot mean trajectories for the top loading genes
###############################################################################

top_genes_for_plot <- loading_table %>%
  slice(1:8) %>%
  pull(Gene)

sample_meta_for_plot <- valid_samples %>%
  select(SampleName, FishID_meta, TimeWeek_meta) %>%
  left_join(
    valid_fish %>% select(FishID_meta, AgeDeathDays, LifespanGroup),
    by = "FishID_meta"
  ) %>%
  arrange(FishID_meta, TimeWeek_meta)

expr_top <- t(logcpm_top[top_genes_for_plot, sample_meta_for_plot$SampleName])
expr_top <- as.data.frame(expr_top, check.names = FALSE)
expr_top$SampleName <- rownames(expr_top)

expr_long <- expr_top %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(top_genes_for_plot),
    names_to = "Gene",
    values_to = "Expression"
  ) %>%
  left_join(sample_meta_for_plot, by = "SampleName") %>%
  mutate(
    LifespanGroup = factor(LifespanGroup, levels = c("short_lived", "long_lived"))
  )

p_top_gene_trajectories <- ggplot(
  expr_long,
  aes(x = TimeWeek_meta, y = Expression, color = LifespanGroup, group = LifespanGroup)
) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("short_lived" = "tomato", "long_lived" = "turquoise3")) +
  ggtitle("Mean trajectories of top tPLS-DA loading genes") +
  xlab("Age at fin clip (weeks)") +
  ylab("log2(CPM + 1)")

print(p_top_gene_trajectories)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_top_loading_gene_trajectories.png"),
  plot = p_top_gene_trajectories,
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

###############################################################################
# 9) Save all result tables
###############################################################################

fish_statistical_tests <- bind_rows(
  obs_tplsda_manova %>% select(analysis, statistic, p_value),
  tplsda_perm_test %>% select(analysis, statistic, p_value),
  concat_manova %>% select(analysis, statistic, p_value)
)

write.csv(
  fish_statistical_tests,
  file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_statistical_tests.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  tplsda_scores,
  file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_tplsda_scores.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  lifespan_lm_table,
  file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_lifespan_lm_coefficients.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  lifespan_model_summary,
  file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_lifespan_lm_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  lifespan_cor_table,
  file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_lifespan_correlations.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  delta_tests,
  file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_delta_group_tests_all_genes.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  top_loading_with_delta,
  file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_top_loading_with_delta_tests.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  overlap_summary,
  file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_top_loading_delta_overlap.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\nEnhanced fish analysis finished.\n")
cat("Results saved in:", out_dir_fish, "\n")
print(fish_statistical_tests)
print(lifespan_model_summary)
print(lifespan_cor_table)
print(overlap_summary)
```

Functional annotation check

```{r}
if (requireNamespace("gprofiler2", quietly = TRUE)) {
  top_for_enrichment <- loading_table %>%
    slice(1:100) %>%
    pull(Gene)
  
  gost_res <- tryCatch(
    gprofiler2::gost(
      query = top_for_enrichment,
      organism = "nfurzeri",
      sources = c("GO:BP", "KEGG", "REAC")
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  if (!is.null(gost_res) && !is.null(gost_res$result)) {
    write.csv(
      gost_res$result,
      file.path(out_dir_fish, "fish_top_loading_gprofiler_enrichment.csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )
    head(gost_res$result, 20)
  } else {
    message("g:Profiler did not return enrichment results for these IDs.")
  }
} else {
  message("gprofiler2 is not installed; enrichment was not run.")
}
```
